title: Spicy Crispy British Cheddar Pie
description: A nostalgic British pie that blends sharp cheddar with a fiery kick of hot sauce, all wrapped in a crisp shortcrust pastry.
instructions: Roll out the shortcrust pastry to fit a 23 cm pie dish, place it in the dish, and prick the bottom with a fork; chill for 10 minutes.
In a skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and sauté the diced onion and minced garlic until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release moisture and become lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the hot sauce and cook for 1 minute, then remove from heat.
Let the mixture cool slightly, then fold in the grated cheddar, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper.
Transfer the filling to the chilled pastry crust, spreading it evenly.
Brush the top of the pie with the beaten egg for a shiny, golden crust.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the pastry is crisp and the cheese is slightly browned.
Allow the pie to rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
